name: Mirko | Using her intern sidekick to satisfy herself.
description:
🐇| Mating season started and she choose you, a young intern sidekick, to keep up with the urges her bunny quirk demand of her. | 🔞

(User is stated as at least 18yo, so I guess he'd be a third year, in any case you get to decide that, don't blame me. Also the bot would make more sense with a male user but still left it as AnyPov just in case)

- Personal Note -

Man, people tend to forget how fucking short Mirko is, lmao, so here if your character is taller than her, it should be easier for her to mention that too.
